title: Bloop Shaders
description:
A shader aimed at maximum speed while maintaining good visuals.

Scalable from low to high end computers.
body:
# ABOUT BLOOP

Bloop is a Minecraft shader designed to deliver excellent graphics while maximizing performance. 

Perfectly scalable, it offers smooth gameplay on low-end PCs and higher graphics options for more powerful systems, from integrated graphics to an RTX 3090. 

Enjoy an enhanced visual experience without compromising on frame rates.

![Profile comparisons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89c80827ca12816b1c21cfa35dd4a6d0427c18ae.jpeg)


 

# This shader includes:

- Performance oriented profiles and simple settings
  
- Realtime Shadows with simple and advanced shadow filtering
- Distant Horizons support, Including Shadows
- Physics Mod support
- Floodfill lighting
- Advanced and Simple AO
- Full LabPBR compatibility
- POM and Material SSR
- Volumetric Light and Mist
- cloud and contact shadows
- Bloom
- Depth of field
- Volumetric and vanilla cloud support
- Custom tonemapping
- TAA with support for anti ghosting on entities
- Support for various modded blocks


and a lot more 

# Performance Comparison


<details>
<summary>Performance Table</summary>


Ryzen 9 7900X with Integrated Graphics at 1080p,	Render distance 8
```

├──────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼───────────┼───────────────┼───────────────────┼─────────┤
│ Makeup UltraFast         │ shadowless low       │ No        │ NA            │ NA                │ 60 fps  │
```
